slider.caption: STARTUP
slider.sub: Piyush Raj from Government Engineering College, Jamui has been awarded a ₹15 lakh Product Development Grant for his laundry-based project presented at Idea Hackathon 4.0 by the Ministry of MSME. His innovation also creates employment opportunities for local youth through PM Vishwakarma 18 Trades.
